Section D — Evidence of Learning

What I've Done

Real certificates, projects, and workshops that demonstrate my learning journey in cybersecurity and networking at Universiti Sultan Zainal Abidin (UniSZA).

Courses & Certificates Completed

Academic Award

Anugerah Dekan — Dean's List

Awarded the Dean's List recognition for outstanding academic achievement in Semester I, Session 2024/2025. Studying Sarjana Muda Sains Komputer (Keselamatan Rangkaian Komputer) dengan Kepujian at UniSZA's Fakulti Informatik dan Komputeran.

18 November 2025Achieved
Workshop Certificate

Computer Networking Course — Smart Network Bootcamp

Certificate of Participation from the Computer Networking Course (Smart Network Bootcamp) held on 23rd & 24th November 2025. Organised by the Faculty of Informatics and Computing, UniSZA Besut Campus, co-organised by Forziq Sdn Bhd.

Nov 2025Completed
Cisco Certification

CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials

Completed CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials through the Cisco Networking Academy program, offered by Universiti Sultan Zainal Abidin (UniSZA). Covers VLANs, inter-VLAN routing, STP, EtherChannel, DHCPv4/v6, and wireless LAN concepts.

02 Dec 2025Certified

Projects Completed

SULAM Project — Digital Marketing for SME (Kedai Makan Tokma)

Community Service Project

As part of the SULAM (Sulaman Komuniti) programme, our team assisted a local SME business — Kedai Makan Tokma — by implementing digital marketing strategies to help grow their business. This involved creating social media presence, designing digital menus and promotional materials, and educating the business owner on how to leverage online platforms to reach more customers. The project demonstrated how technology and digital skills can create real-world economic impact for small businesses in the community.

Digital Marketing SME Development Community Service Social Media SULAM Programme

Projek Khidmat Masyarakat — Technology Awareness Programme

Exco Role · Public Service

Served as Exco for the Projek Khidmat Masyarakat, a community outreach initiative focused on educating the public about the importance of technology in the modern era. As part of this role, I delivered a Du'a recitation during the official opening ceremony, and contributed to organising sessions that introduced participants to digital literacy, online safety, and the practical relevance of IT skills in everyday life. This project sharpened my public speaking, event management, and communication skills.

Public Speaking Community Outreach Technology Awareness Exco Digital Literacy

Final Year Project — Financial Transaction Anomaly Detection

FYP · Research Project

My Final Year Project focuses on "Financial Transaction Anomaly Detection using Unsupervised Machine Learning and Raspberry Pi". The system uses unsupervised ML algorithms (such as Isolation Forest and Autoencoders) to detect anomalous patterns in financial transaction data without requiring labelled training data — making it suitable for real-world fraud detection scenarios where labelled fraud examples are scarce. The solution is deployed on a Raspberry Pi, demonstrating that edge-computing devices can run lightweight security monitoring systems in resource-constrained environments. This project bridges my interest in cybersecurity, machine learning, and embedded systems.

Machine Learning Anomaly Detection Raspberry Pi Python Unsupervised Learning Financial Security Edge Computing

Workshops & Training

🌐

CCNA — Cisco Networking Academy

Completed CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials through UniSZA's Cisco NetAcad partnership. Covered VLANs, STP, inter-VLAN routing, wireless LAN, EtherChannel, and DHCPv4/v6 configuration.

Certified · Dec 2025
📡

Cisco Packet Tracer — Network Simulation Labs

Completed hands-on labs using Cisco Packet Tracer for network topology design, router/switch configuration, VLAN segmentation, routing protocol implementation (RIP, OSPF), and network troubleshooting simulations.

Completed
🔬

NS3 Project — MANET (Mobile Ad Hoc Network) Simulation

Conducted network simulation research using NS3 (Network Simulator 3) focusing on Mobile Ad Hoc Networks (MANET). Simulated node mobility, routing protocols (AODV, OLSR), and evaluated network performance metrics such as throughput, packet delivery ratio, and end-to-end delay in dynamic wireless environments.

Completed
🛡

Smart Network Bootcamp — Forziq Sdn Bhd × UniSZA

Two-day intensive Computer Networking Course organised by the Faculty of Informatics and Computing, UniSZA Besut Campus, in collaboration with Forziq Sdn Bhd. Covered practical networking concepts and industry-relevant hands-on configuration exercises.

Nov 2025
